title: Input schema of the Restaurant Menu & Analytics Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to start with. Provide restaurant/menu pages or search pages on delivery apps. Note: many delivery apps render client-side — use Playwright for dynamic pages.

sources.title: Sources to tag
sources.description: Optional list of source tags (e.g., UberEats, DoorDash) to aid downstream analytics.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests that can be made by this crawler.

currency.title: Default Currency
currency.description: Default currency to assume for prices when not explicitly provided.
